info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to hurt

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'udDaranti kumInaNgAd daSato nikazanti ca' (BA0 SAM0 18014) nikazanti kaRqUyanena hiMsanti
'saBAnikazakawasvastarAMSca' (Apa0 Da0 1813) nikazo nAma kfzIvalAnAmupakaraRaM kfzwaM kzetraM yena samIkriyate yacca kasmiMScidArUQe kenacidAkfzyate iti haradatta ujjvalAyAm**
